g.title: Developer or team member
Container engine
Remote modules
bash/sh/PowerShell
**CUE** ~/.config/invowk/config.cue
**CUE** invowkfile.cue command definitions
**Directories** *.invowkmod directories with invowkmod.cue + invowkfile.cue
**Filesystem** ~/.invowk/modules/
**Go/Cobra** Root, cmd, init, config, module, tui, validate, completion, audit
**Go** Execution pipeline: discover, resolve definitions, validate inputs, resolve runtime, build context, dry-run gate, host-access port, dispatch
**Go** Infrastructure adapters implementing commandsvc ports: host access, runtime registry construction, and interactive execution
**Go** Validates host dependencies and selected container runtime dependencies
**Go** Resolves runtime selection and dispatches to runtime implementations
**Go** Locates invowkfiles and modules with precedence ordering
**Go/CUE** Loads and validates user configuration
**Go/cuelang** 3-step parsing: compile schema, unify data, decode
**Go** Git-based dependency resolution with caching
**Go/fsnotify** File-watching with debounced re-execution for --ivk-watch mode
**Go** Security scanning of module system. Detects supply-chain risks, path traversal, symlink abuse, env var injection. Supports --llm.
**Go** Executes via host shell (bash/sh/PowerShell)
**Go/mvdan-sh** Embedded shell interpreter with u-root builtins
**Go** Executes inside Docker/Podman containers
**Go** Unified Docker/Podman interface with auto-fallback
**Go** Creates ephemeral layers with invowk binary and modules
**Go/Wish** Enables container-to-host callbacks via SSH tunneling
**Go/Bubble Tea** HTTP server for TUI requests from child processes
